title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
